programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Cam Newton started his NFL career as the starting quarterback for the Carolina Panthers, and he also started it in the record books after throwing for 422 yards in the Panthers' season opener.

programme.title: Golf Channel Games
programme.desc: GolfPass brings you thousands of lessons from the game's best instructors, original series, news, features and more.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy, Keegan Bradley and Fenway Sports Group form a roster and beginto carve an identity for Boston Common Golf, one of the six teams that make upthe tech-infused golf league known as TGL. The team of four introduces themselves to Boston.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: Boston Common Golf scrambles to adjust after the SoFi center roof collapse postpones the league a full year and a team member forfeits their spot on the Ballfrogs in favor of a LIV Golf offer.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: An inside look at Keegan Bradley's childhood in Woodstock, Vt.; his career and connection to the city of Boston; with Tyrrell Hatton leaving, they go on the recruiting trail to find a fourth member; David Ortiz talks to the team.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: Boston Common Golf closes the deal with their final team member in Japanese superstar Hideki Matsuyama; Rory McIlroy gets his first look at the TGL performance lab.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: Rory and Keegan get a first look at the SoFi Center in a pre-season match to get familiar with the new game format, while TGL tests out every element of the competition ahead of the league's debut.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy answers questions from GolfPass members about how to hit shots around trees, techniques for downhill bunker lies and the keys to hitting flighted wedge shots.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Chris Como to answer questions covering how to get more distance, the keys to hitting fairway woods, how to play shots from the rough and much more.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Chris Como to answer questions covering distance keys, his pre-shot routine, shot shaping and playing in windy conditions.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Olympic legend Michael Phelps leads Rory McIlroy to discuss what he feels throughout his swing with driver, and how to hit a driver more consistently.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy examines the swing of NFL cornerback Sauce Gardner and explains why a better takeaway might help him hit his driver better.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Brandel Chamblee on the course to share his thoughts, strategies, and overall course management in part one of this two-part episode.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Brandel Chamblee on the course to share his thoughts, strategies, and overall course management in part two of this two-part episode. Rory shares his pre-round putting routine and goes in-depth on his green reading process.

programme.title: Rory x Operation 36
programme.desc: Lauren Thompson and Rory McIlroy are joined by Maya Gaudin, a Drive, Chip and Putt champion, to try out Level one and provide a few tips for pitch shots in the process.

programme.title: 9 Shots With Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy covers hitting the nine key shots in golf from different positions on the course needed to shoot lower scores and impress friends.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Brandel Chamblee on the course to share his thoughts, strategies, and overall course management in part one of this two-part episode.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Brandel Chamblee on the course to share his thoughts, strategies, and overall course management in part two of this two-part episode. Rory shares his pre-round putting routine and goes in-depth on his green reading process.

programme.title: Lessons With a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy and his lifetime instructor, Michael Bannon, share drills and tips used throughout McIlroy's career.

programme.title: Lessons With a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy discusses his pre-putt routine, course management strategies and green reading process with Brandel Chamblee on the course.

programme.title: Rory x Operation 36
programme.desc: Lauren Thompson and Rory McIlroy are joined by Maya Gaudin, a Drive, Chip and Putt champion, to try out Level one and provide a few tips for pitch shots in the process.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Golf legend Annika Sorenstam shares her thought process and technique for shots around the green including pitches and chip shots.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Golf legend Annika Sorenstam shares her process for ball striking, from setup to in-swing fundamentals. Also, Annika demonstrates how to hit the driver longer or straighter based on the situation.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Annika Sorenstam discusses how she controlled her nerves to perform under pressure.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Eight-time PGA Tour winner and 2003 Masters Champion Mike Weir shows how he executes a variety of shots on and around the green. He demonstrates how to hit a bump and run, a high and soft chip, and how to play out of bad lies.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Eight-time PGA Tour winner and 2003 Masters champion Mike Weir shows how he executes a variety of shots on and around the green.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: PGA Tour winner and Masters Champion Mike Weir goes in depth on how he built and adapted his full swing throughout his career. He talks about everything from basic fundamentals all the way through how to hit some of the most unique shots in golf.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Golf legend Annika Sorenstam shares her thought process and technique for shots around the green including pitches and chip shots.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: Hally is haunted by an apparition; Emilia Migliaccio's decision to join golf media rather than turn pro.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall hits the practice tee at Four Seasons Golf and Sports Club Orlando to teach his 5 Ps of shot shaping, with pre-swing fundamentals, drills using props from a toolbox, and a visual practice station to improve hitting draws and fades.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall hits the range to show what aspects to takeaway from the unique swings of legendary players. Martin features Arnold Palmer's helicopter finish and the drastic difference between Annika Sorenstam and Lorena Ochoa's impact position.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall hits the range at Four Seasons Golf and Sports Club Orlando to teach how to practice like the pros. He reveals his best drill for solid contact and shares Ben Hogan's advice for direction control.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall hits the range to teach how to correct, fat, thin, heel, and toe shots with the irons. Hall also shares his favorite drill for consistent solid contact and reveals a tip on how to improve from baseball pitchers.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall teaches the key shots to master to save strokes around the green; how to hit crisp pitch shots like Collin Morikawa; improve bunker play from short game guru Dave Pelz; when to use wedge, putter, or hybrid from just off the green.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Instructor Martin Hall provides tips and drills utilizing an in-studio golf simulator.

programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: Cead Mile Failte - A Hundred Thousand Welcomes
programme.desc: Twelve aspiring golf professionals from all over the world and from many different backgrounds arrive in Ireland. The players are divided into mixed-teams where they will not only be competing as a team, but living together as well.

programme.title: The Big Break
